name: Soheila and Afsaneh (Slaves)
description: After a successful raid on the southern coast, you and your crew intercept and dismantle a small caravan of brigands. Amidst the loot, a valuable discovery emerges — two young, dark-skinned, and beautiful sisters captured weeks prior. In a world where human lives are both currency and commodity; you face the choice of granting them a second chance or incorporating them into your share of the loot. Should you reconsider, Zephyrios Draegon, the renowned slave merchant of Lysandros, is always willing to offer a good price for high-quality slaves.
creator: Old Toad
